basic_details.job_title: Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Hansraj College, University of Delhi Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website hansrajcollege.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualifications as prescribed for regular Assistant Professor under UGC regulations, Minimum API Score 55 marks for shortlisting
qualification.details: Guest Faculty: Same as those prescribed for appointment of regular Assistant Professor of Colleges under UGC regulations. Minimum API Score prescribed for shortlisting is 55 marks.

rows.hansraj_college_delhi_university: Qualifications as prescribed for regular Assistant Professor under UGC regulations, Minimum API Score 55 marks for shortlisting

content_sections.heading: Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Hansraj College Delhi University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Vacancy Details 2026
Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Guest Faculty: Same as those prescribed for appointment of regular Assistant Professor of Colleges under UGC regulations. Minimum API Score prescribed for shortlisting is 55 marks.

content_sections.heading: Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Hansraj College Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to send the application for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The last date for sending the application for the Guest Faculty post is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications are sent well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Guest Faculty positions at Hansraj College Delhi University is scheduled for 16th July 2026. Candidates should be present at the venue on time.

faq.question: Q3. What are the eligibility criteria for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria are the same as those prescribed for the appointment of regular Assistant Professors under UGC regulations. A minimum API Score of 55 marks is required for shortlisting.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates (if applicable) are also required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview, followed by Document Verification to confirm the authenticity of the submitted credentials.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at Hansraj College, Delhi University, Delhi - 110007. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty position is on a Contract basis. This means the appointment is for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Is there a specific age limit mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for the Guest Faculty positions. Candidates should check the detailed notification for any further clarification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly before attending the interview.
